title: trineuria rigescens
intro: Trineuria rigescens, also known as the "Rigid Water Fern", is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Trichoptera. The Rigid Water Fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions, as well as reducing fever and pain. Herbal preparations of Trineuria rigescens can be made by infusing the plant in hot water, making a tea that can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
